events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: form build & bracing, inadequate bracing/kickers for pour pressure, in-progress. ACI 347 governs formwork. Inadequate bracing is a serious hazard - form failure during pour can cause concrete blowout, injury, death. Decision fail, risk critical/high. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant.

"findings": [
"Inadequate bracing/kickers installed to resist concrete pour pressure",
"Formwork system not in compliance with engineered form design/ACI 347 lateral and vertical load requirements",
"Risk of form blowout or collapse during active placement due to insufficient lateral support"
],
"actions": [
"Stop concrete placement immediately and clear personnel from the pour area",
"Isolate and barricade the affected formwork; restrict access until corrected",
"Verify installed bracing against the engineered formwork drawings and ACI 347 design loads",
"Install additional bracing/kickers/anchors as required by the formwork design before resuming pour",
"Have competent person/engineer re-inspect and sign off on bracing prior to resuming placement"
],
"rationale": "Inadequate bracing for pour pressure creates an imminent risk of formwork failure and concrete blowout during active placement, endangering workers and the work area. ACI 347 requires formwork and bracing to be designed and installed to safely resist all anticipated loads, including concrete pressure, wind, and construction loads. The work is non-compliant and defective as installed.",
"references": ["ACI 347"]
}
